description: A color photograph of a press conference. A man in a dark suit and patterned tie speaks at a wooden lectern bearing the Department of Homeland Security seal, while four other men in suits stand in a row behind and beside him. An American flag and a second flag flank the group. A large screen on the wall behind them displays OPERATION TWIN SHIELD with agency seals and names below.
notable_text: OPERATION TWIN SHIELD; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services
